E:\IDE\Qt\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\file_managerment.dir/objects.a
E:\IDE\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\file_managerment.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\file_managerment.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\IDE\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\file_managerment.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o file_managerment.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libfile_managerment.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\file_managerment.dir\linkLibs.rsp
